question: Field technicians on T-003 reported intermittent partial discharge symptoms during their last inspection. Identify the failure mode that best matches this symptom and list the sensor readings most useful for confirming and tracking its progression.
effective_question: Field technicians on T-003 reported intermittent partial discharge symptoms during their last inspection. Identify the failure mode that best matches this symptom and list the sensor readings most useful for confirming and tracking its progression.
answer:
The failure mode that best matches the symptom of intermittent partial discharge on T-003 is "Partial Discharge" (FM-001). 

The sensor readings most useful for confirming and tracking the progression of this failure mode are:

1. Load current (load_current_a) - to monitor changes in electrical load that may contribute to partial discharge.
2. Oil temperature (oil_temp_c) - to monitor the thermal conditions within the insulation system.
3. Power factor - to monitor changes in electrical system efficiency that may indicate partial discharge.
4. Winding temperature (winding_temp_top_c) - to monitor thermal conditions within the winding insulation.

These sensor readings will help confirm and track the progression of partial discharge on T-003.

scenario.text: Field technicians on T-003 reported intermittent partial discharge symptoms during their last inspection. Identify the failure mode that best matches this symptom and list the sensor readings most useful for confirming and tracking its progression.
scenario.characteristic_form: The answer should identify a specific failure mode matching the symptom, cite the match rationale, and list the sensors most correlated with tracking that mode.
